requirement_topic.zh: KEBS PVoC 进口符合性路径
requirement_topic.zht: KEBS PVoC 進口符合性路徑

summary.en: KEBS describes PVoC as a conformity assessment program applied in exporting countries to ensure products comply with applicable Kenyan Technical Regulations and Mandatory Standards or approved specifications. KEBS also states that the basis of certification is Kenya standards or approved specifications and that importers should ensure consignments are accompanied by a Certificate of Conformity from appointed PVoC agents for products subject to the program.
summary.zh: KEBS说明，PVoC是在出口国实施的符合性评定程序，用于确保产品符合适用的肯尼亚技术法规、强制标准或认可规格。KEBS还说明，认证依据为肯尼亚标准或认可规格；对适用PVoC的产品，进口商应确保货物随附由指定PVoC机构签发的符合性证书。
summary.zht: KEBS說明，PVoC是在出口國實施的符合性評定程序，用於確保產品符合適用的肯亞技術法規、強制標準或認可規格。KEBS還說明，認證依據為肯亞標準或認可規格；對適用PVoC的產品，進口商應確保貨物隨附由指定PVoC機構簽發的符合性證書。

standards_or_laws: The Verification of Conformity to Kenya Standards of Imports (Amendment) Order, 2020 (Legal Notice No. 78 of 2020)
Applicable Kenyan Technical Regulations and Mandatory Standards

summary.en: China EV charger dossiers commonly rely on GB/T 18487 for conductive charging systems and GB/T 20234 for connection devices. These reports can support a Kenyan technical file but do not replace KEBS PVoC route selection, shipment inspection, Certificate of Conformity issuance, or confirmation that the cited China standard is accepted as an approved specification.
summary.zh: 中国充电桩资料通常依据 GB/T 18487 传导充电系统和 GB/T 20234 连接装置。这些报告可支持肯尼亚技术文件，但不能替代 KEBS PVoC 路径选择、装运检验、符合性证书签发，或确认所引用中国标准是否被接受为认可规格。
summary.zht: 中國充電樁資料通常依據 GB/T 18487 傳導充電系統和 GB/T 20234 連接裝置。這些報告可支持肯亞技術文件，但不能替代 KEBS PVoC 路徑選擇、裝運檢驗、符合性證書簽發，或確認所引用中國標準是否被接受為認可規格。

gap.en: Exporters should classify the charger, cables, sockets, spare parts, and accessories by HS code and product description, confirm whether PVoC applies, identify the applicable Kenyan Standard or approved specification, and prepare test reports, inspection records, labels, English manuals, shipment documents, and importer records before shipment.
gap.zh: 出口商应按HS编码和产品描述对充电桩、电缆、插座、备件和附件进行归类，确认是否适用PVoC，识别适用的肯尼亚标准或认可规格，并在装运前准备测试报告、检验记录、标签、英文说明书、装运文件和进口商资料。
gap.zht: 出口商應按HS編碼和產品描述對充電樁、電纜、插座、備件和附件進行歸類，確認是否適用PVoC，識別適用的肯亞標準或認可規格，並在裝運前準備測試報告、檢驗記錄、標籤、英文說明書、裝運文件和進口商資料。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for goods subject to Kenya PVoC and not covered by an exemption or destination-inspection route; exact EV charger scope must be confirmed by classification, model, and route
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T evidence is technical support for the export file and is not a KEBS Certificate of Conformity

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat KEBS PVoC as the first import-gate question. A China GB/T report should be mapped into the KEBS route and accepted specification before relying on it for Kenyan clearance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应首先将 KEBS PVoC 作为进口准入问题处理。中国 GB/T 报告应先映射到 KEBS 路径和被接受的规格，再用于肯尼亚清关依据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應首先將 KEBS PVoC 作為進口准入問題處理。中國 GB/T 報告應先映射到 KEBS 路徑和被接受的規格，再用於肯亞清關依據。
